Commercial_CurrentCardPaymentFundingDays.fieldLabel: Current number of days for card payment funding

labels.title: What is my estimated annual return with next day card payment funding?
labels.answer: Your estimated annual return is $%amount%

selectors.label: Estimated annual return with next day card payment funding

labels.note: NOTE: If you don't accept cards, you can still calculate what your potential increased cash flow could be if you accepted cards and had next-day funding from PNC Merchant Services®. To do this, just indicate your current payment terms (example net 30, 60, 90) as the current number of days for card payment funding.
labels.annualCostWithNextDay: Annual cost of capital with next day finding
labels.annualCostWithCurrentDay: Annual cost of capital with %numberOfdays% days funding

dailycardprocessingsales.title: Daily card processing sales
dailycardprocessingsales.definition: The total dollar amount of card payments the business receives on a daily basis.

annualcostofcapital.title: Annual cost of capital
annualcostofcapital.definition: The weighted average of a business cost of debt as well as its cost of equity.

daysforcardpaymentfunding.title: Days for card payment funding
daysforcardpaymentfunding.definition: The number of days it takes for card processing sales to be credited to the business account.

custommonthlypayment.title: Monthly Payment
custommonthlypayment.definition: Minimum payment is $100 or 1.5% of outstanding debt, whichever is greater. Choose a payment amount to see how it impacts the pay-off time.

chartTitles.title: Column chart of the estimated annual return with next day card payment funding.

tableTitles.title: Estimated annual return with next day card payment funding
